mapper.select:
SELECT dd.id AS dataDifferenceId, dd.result_name AS resultName, dd.other_organ_id as otherOrganId, dd.tag as differenceTag, ddt.id as taskId, ddt.task_id as taskIdName, dt.task_name as taskName, dt.task_start_time as taskStart, dt.task_end_time as taskEnd, ddt.task_state as taskState, ddt.ascription as ascription, ddt.create_date as createDate FROM data_difference dd, data_difference_task ddt LEFT JOIN data_task dt ON ddt.task_id = dt.task_id_name WHERE dd.id = ddt.difference_id
ORDER BY dd.id desc LIMIT #{offset},#{pageSize}
SELECT count(dd.id) FROM data_difference dd, data_difference_task ddt WHERE dd.id = ddt.difference_id

SELECT id,difference_id as differenceId,task_id as taskId,task_state as taskState,ascription,ascription_type as ascriptionType,file_path filePath,file_content fileContent,create_date createDate FROM data_difference_task WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id,difference_id as differenceId,task_id as taskId,task_state as taskState,ascription,ascription_type as ascriptionType,file_path filePath,file_content fileContent,create_date createDate FROM data_difference_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId}

select id,own_organ_id as ownOrganId,own_resource_id as ownResourceId,own_keyword as ownKeyword, other_organ_id as otherOrganId,other_resource_id as otherResourceId,other_keyword as otherKeyword, output_file_path_type as outputFilePathType,output_no_repeat as outputNoRepeat,tag as tag, result_name as resultName,output_format as outputFormat,result_organ_ids as resultOrganIds, difference_direction as differenceDirection, remarks,user_id as userId,create_date as createDate,tee_organ_id as teeOrganId from data_difference where id = #{id}
